title: Glade Jar Candle, Scented Candle Infused with Essential Oils, Made without Palm oil, Up to 25 Hour Burn Time, Relaxing Zen, Pack of 6 (6x108g)
features: Burn time of 25 hours of Glade fragrance
Relaxing Zen with notes of lotus flowers, muguet and lily pads
Fragrance crafted by master perfumers and infused with essential oils and made without phthalates, parabens, formaldehydes
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page Previous page Next page How long can I burn a Glade Candle for? For best performance, burn 2 to 4 hours at a time. This will maximise the life of your candle. What should I do for Glade best maintenance? Wick maintenance is key for best burning. Trim the wick to 6.35mm just before lighting and be sure to remove any debris on the wax. Any tips on Glade Candle safety? Do not touch, lift or move a burning candle. Wait until wax has cooled and hardened before touching a candle. For optimal performance, keep burning candles away from drafts, vents and air currents. Candle wax can be temperature sensitive. How do I know my Glade Candle is empty? Stop using your Glade Candle when 6.35 mm of wax remains. Can I reuse a Glade Candle jar? Yes, you can reuse the jar after throughly washing it. Make your home feel homier with Glade Jar Candle Small Jar Candle Plug In Sense & Spray Reed Diffuser Jar Candle Glade Fragrance Relaxing Zen Luscious Cherry & Peony Exotic Tropical Blossom Pure Clean Linen Relaxing Zen Romantic Vanilla Blossom Notes of Lotus, Muguet, Lily Pads Peony, Cherries, White Woods Monoi, Melon, Coconut Milk Crisp Air, Fresh Laundry,Lily Lotus, Muguet, Lily Pads Vanilla, Orchid, Sandalwood Lasts For Up to 20 hours Up to 25 hours Up to 120 days (on low) Up to 2 months Up to 5 weeks Up to 20 hours Technology Burn to create ambiance Burn to create ambiance Electric device Battery-operated device Passive Fragrance release Burn to create ambiance Content 6 x 108g 6 x 112g 4 x Holder & 4 x Refill (20ml) 4 x Holder & 4 x Refill (18ml) 6 x 50ml 6 x 108g
